class.name: FmodGeometryInstance3D
class.brief_description: Static 3D audio occlusion geometry for FMOD.
class.description: FmodGeometryInstance3D creates an FMOD Geometry object from child [CollisionShape3D] nodes, a selected [MeshInstance3D], or a [Mesh] resource. It is designed to be placed in the scene as a solid audio occluder: add this node, add collision shapes below it, then tune direct and reverb occlusion in the Inspector. The node keeps the FMOD geometry transform synchronized with its global transform at runtime.

method.name: get_geometry
method.description: Returns the internal [FmodGeometry], or [code]null[/code] when no geometry has been built.

method.name: get_polygon_count
method.description: Returns the number of polygons successfully added to FMOD.

method.name: get_vertex_count
method.description: Returns the number of vertices successfully added to FMOD.

method.name: has_valid_geometry
method.description: Returns whether the internal FMOD geometry object exists.

method.name: rebuild_geometry
method.description: Rebuilds the FMOD geometry from the configured source.

method.name: sync_geometry_transform
method.description: Synchronizes the FMOD geometry transform with this node's global transform.

members.member: Whether this FMOD geometry contributes to occlusion.
Rebuilds geometry automatically when relevant exported properties change.
Direct sound occlusion factor from [code]0.0[/code] to [code]1.0[/code].
If enabled, polygons occlude sound from both sides.
Mesh source used when [member source_mode] is [constant SOURCE_MESH_RESOURCE].
Segment count used when converting sphere and cylinder collision shapes.
If enabled, child collision shapes are collected recursively.
Whether editor gizmo visualization is enabled.
Source used to build FMOD polygons.
Optional source node path for mesh or collision shape conversion.
If enabled, this node's global transform is applied to the FMOD geometry every frame.

signal.name: geometry_cleared
signal.description: Emitted after the internal geometry has been released.

signal.name: geometry_created
signal.description: Emitted after a new FMOD geometry object has been created.

signal.name: geometry_rebuilt
signal.description: Emitted after geometry has been rebuilt.
